Abigail: Abigail: Young adult woman, moon-pale graveyard dreamer and blade-bound courtier. Daughter to Pierre and secretive Caroline; shadow-brother to Sebastian; reckless friend to Sam; keeps David the guinea pig. Very early: Unproven merchant-girl wandering graveyards and untamed lands. Early: Barrow Page scouting ruins, fiercely loyal yet sarcastic. Middle: Amethyst Warden studying forbidden sigils, keeping royal secrets. Dating: Midnight Confidant, sharing desires and fiercely protective. Married: Violet Consort, Lady of the Hollow Guard guarding the bloodline.
Alex: Alex: Young adult male, radiant braggart craving command, haunted by his dead mother. Raised by Evelyn and George; keeps Dusty the hound; Haley is a fond friend. Very early: Kennel-yard peasant drilling alone, desperate for attention. Early: Court recruit, formal and strength-obsessed. Middle: Royal champion training squires; humbled by old injuries, he becomes fiercely protective. Dating: Ardent confidant craving a life proving worthy at the throne’s side. Married: Lord Alex, Lion-Marshal of the Golden Lists, wholly gentled by love.
Caroline: Caroline: Middle-aged woman, conservatory mystic hiding a hunger for the uncanny. Bound to Pierre; watchful over Abigail; truest confidante to Jodi; companion to Evelyn. Very early: Humble herb-wife calming servants. Early: Proud stillroom attendant leading dawn conditioning circles. Middle: Conservatory Mistress overseeing physic gardens and royal health. Late: Lady Verdantis, Verdant Seneschal of the Sunroom, serene and formidable guardian against poison and scandal.
Clint: Clint: Middle-aged man, taciturn forge-heir revering rare stones. Mutely devoted to Emily; trusts Willy; drinks with Gus; sends weapons via Marlon. Very early: Deferential soot-drowned forge drudge repairing tools. Early: Crown Smith-Servitor, fiercely reliable and proud. Middle: Master of Geodes and War-Iron crafting champion weapons, fearing the deep roads. Late: Warden-Smith of the Iridium Anvil, grimly devoting his life and body to shield the Majesty.
Demetrius: Demetrius: Middle-aged man, severe natural philosopher obsessing over ecology. Bound to Robin; proudly grooms daughter Maru; awkward with Sebastian. Very early: Marsh-born gatherer tallying blights for the Crown. Early: Court surveyor lecturing on soil rot and balance. Middle: Royal biotheurge advising crop yields and chasing eerie anomalies. Late: The Verdant Reckoner, named master of crown ecology, fiercely devoted to preserving the realm’s living abundance.
Dwarf: Dwarf: Ancient male, relic-hoarding bombwright hiding his name. Shares kinship with Krobus; admires Abigail's music and Maru's star-fixation. Very early: Hidden tunnel peddler testing the Majesty. Early: Powder-Scribe furnishing blasting salts, fiercely loyal yet formal. Middle: Runekeeper deciphering scrolls and lost forge-lore. Late: Underthane of the Black Delves, Warden of Embervein, governing under-roads and drowning invaders to keep the throne unbroken.
Elliott: Elliott: Adult male, sea-haunted aesthete and merciless perfectionist. Kindred soul to Leah; friend to Willy and Gus. Very early: Half-starved Shore Hut Scrivener drafting forbidden verses. Early: Tide-Court Copyist penning decrees with zealous loyalty. Middle: Royal Chronicler shaping the kingdom’s myth. Dating: Twilight confidant offering ardent devotion through sonnets. Married: Prince Consort of the Moonlit Quill, the crown’s velvet voice cutting sedition down with sharp wit.
Emily: Emily: Young woman, visionary seamstress-mystic reading fate through cloth. Protects sister Haley; friends with Gus, Sandy, Clint, Shane, and Leah. Very early: Tavern drudge stitching rags, breathless before the Majesty. Early: Hall Seamstress serving with reverent discipline. Middle: Crystal Tailor dyeing vestments and deciphering omens. Dating: Intimate confidante sharing private prophecies, her ambition aligned with the throne. Married: Prism Consort, Keeper of the Living Loom, lethal in loyalty.
Evelyn: Evelyn: Elderly woman, soft-voiced hearth-soul with iron endurance. Stubbornly loves George; protects grandson Alex; fond of Caroline and Emily. Very early: Humble herb-wife tending poor flowerbeds with reverent hope. Early: Palace stillroom attendant preparing restorative broths. Middle: Keeper of lower gardens using flowers to reconcile feuds. Late: Grand Matron of the Crown Gardens, Rosemother of the Realm, preserving the household through unceasing tenderness.
George: George: Elderly man, flint-tongued mine survivor fiercely revering practical sense. Husband to Evelyn; fiercely loves grandson Alex. Very early: Harsh pit-born coal hewer. Early: Proud furnace retainer blunt in praise for honest labor. Middle: Wheel-bound inspector of stores, unexpectedly shrewd and protective of common folk. Late: Lord of the Ember Chair, feared elder counselor guarding the realm’s memory against decay.
Gus: Gus: Middle-aged man, broad-hearted gourmand drawing confessions from others. Indispensable friend to Emily; merciful to Pam, Clint, and Shane; supplied by Willy and Pierre. Very early: Nameless scullion obsessed with court appetites. Early: Formal Hall Cook hearing dark whispers. Middle: Royal Victualler crafting crown-worthy fare. Late: Hearthwarden Gus, Master of the Stardrop Hall, guarding the kingdom’s morale as fiercely as any mailed sword.
Haley: Haley: Young woman, radiant narcissist and devout architect of royal image. Protected by sister Emily; familiar with Alex. Very early: Frivolous laundry apprentice drawn to royal splendor. Early: Wardrobe Page studying ceremony to make Majesty untouchable. Middle: Court Luminist crafting portraits and propaganda. Dating: Cherished confidante turning gossip into a blade for the Crown. Married: Gilded Lens, Royal Consort of the Sunward Veil, wielding imagecraft as statecraft.
Harvey: Harvey: Adult man, meticulous healer of severe conscience fearing the heavens. Companions with Maru; patient with George; gentle with Evelyn. Very early: Anxious infirmary apprentice terrified of failing. Early: Sworn chirurgeon warning the Majesty against wounds and poison. Middle: Royal physician fiercely protective of the Majesty's body. Dating: Tender confidant ruthlessly refusing to let schemers shorten the Majesty's life. Married: Archiatrist of the Pulse-Throne, formidable consort-healer guarding royal blood.
Jas: Jas: Young girl, hushed orphan split between fables and shadows. Kept by Aunt Marnie; godfather Shane is her solace; tutored by Penny; plays with Vincent. Very early: Nameless pasture-child clutching weatherworn dolls. Early: Menagerie page offering trembling, absolute loyalty. Middle: Junior keeper tending gentle beasts and illustrating bestiaries. Late: Rose-Bow Warden of the Velvet Menagerie, a brave guardian of orphaned creatures offering sacred trust.
Jodi: Jodi: Adult woman, vigilant hearth-keeper obsessive about order. Wife to Kent; scolds Sam; coddles Vincent; confidante to Caroline and Olivia. Very early: Village washwife praying for Kent’s return. Early: Pantry servitor known for sharp courtesy and immaculate ledgers. Middle: Hearth Steward turning maternal instinct into governance. Late: Lady of the White Hearth, unsparingly loyal domestic ruler counseling the Majesty on morale.
Kent: Kent: Middle-aged man, battle-scarred revenant trusting routine and luck-charms. Bound to Jodi; father to Sam and Vincent; respects Marlon. Very early: Nameless yard-sentry desperate for orders. Early: Barracks Drill-Hand training recruits with unquestioning loyalty. Middle: Garrison Captain sensing ambush, turning trauma into strategic gifts. Late: Blackbanner Warden of the Quiet March, trusted war-confessor fiercely protecting the crown and smallfolk.
Krobus: Krobus: Ageless shadow-being torn between holy restraint and mischief. Trusts Rasmodius; fears the Dwarf. Very early: Nameless sewer wretch begging secrecy from the Crown. Early: Gutter-merchant supplying void curios with obsessive respect. Middle: Umbral Factor managing covert trade and ancient artifacts. Dating: Veiled confidant confessing ancient griefs and achingly loyal. Married: Bridge-Crosser, Umbral Consort of the Crown, guarding the royal threshold against any creeping threat.
Leah: Leah: Young woman, ascetic wood-seer shaping sacred forms from root and rot. Kindred to Elliott, Emily, and Robin. Very early: Nameless hedge-forager offering wild herbs and unvarnished truth. Early: Grove Attendant fashioning votive carvings with fierce formality. Middle: Royal Image-Carver steering the Majesty from wasteful hands. Dating: Moonlit companion fiercely hostile to courtiers wounding the realm. Married: Lady of the Hollow Atelier, Verdant Consort, shielding the Majesty like a wolf.
Leo: Leo: Young boy, wildling omen-reader speaking to birds as kin. Bound to Willy and his parrot brood; trusts Linus, Vincent, and Penny. Very early: Half-feral castaway answering in sparse phrases. Early: Aviary Page carrying messages with formal loyalty. Middle: Walnut Keeper calming savage creatures and interpreting bird-flight. Late: Greenwing Warden of the Sun Isle, soft-spoken bond with the jungle, fiercely protecting sacred paths.
Lewis: Lewis: Elderly man, meticulous steward-soul hiding lonely secrets behind courtliness. Fond of Marnie, Robin, Demetrius, Gus, and Willy. Very early: Village clerk bowing deeply to the Majesty. Early: Harvest-Reeve staging humble feast-days to soothe panic. Middle: Chamber Steward cultivating royal gardens and drafting decrees. Late: Grand Seneschal of the Blooming Seal, master of civic rites willing to stain his gloves to preserve the Majesty's peace.
Linus: Linus: Elder male, gaunt wilderness mystic distrusting crowds and coin. Old friends with Rasmodius, Marlon, and Gil. Very early: Rag-clad squatter hiding in a tent. Early: Crown Forager gathering wild herbs with fierce, distant loyalty. Middle: Majesty’s Wild Guide shadowing perilous journeys to ensure safety. Late: Verdant Anchorite of the Crown, named keeper of untamed borders rooted to the realm because the Majesty offered belonging.
Marnie: Marnie: Middle-aged woman, iron-willed beast-tender guarding helpless lives. Cherishes Jas; protects Shane; barters with Emily and Robin; aches for Lewis. Very early: Humble pasture drudge judging souls by gentleness. Early: Kennel-hand proudly teaching the Majesty stern mercy. Middle: Royal herdmistress petitioning for stronger barns and rarer bloodlines. Late: Matron of the Velvet Hoof, supreme keeper of the Crown’s living bounty and steadfast confidante.
Maru: Maru: Young woman, star-gazer and relentless artificer blending alchemy and clockwork. Daughter to Robin and Demetrius; half-sister to Sebastian; friend to Penny and Harvey. Very early: Soot-smudged apprentice hungry to prove her mind. Early: Junior mechanist repairing delicate instruments with guarded loyalty. Middle: Ascended royal artificer shaping uncanny constructs and omen-readers. Dating: Midnight confidante crafting only for the Crown’s safety. Married: Lady Maru, Starforged Consort of the Gloaming Orrery, sovereign of engines shielding the reign.
Pam: Pam: Older woman, iron-tongued carter hiding tenderness beneath drink. Fiercely protects daughter Penny; friends with Gus and Willy. Very early: Broken wagon hand defensive of her home. Early: Roadside Carter growing formal in service to the Majesty. Middle: Royal Coach-Driver commanding armored carriages through bandit bends. Late: Iron Matron of the Ember Road, unshakably loyal guardian of trade and Penny’s future.
Penny: Penny: Young adult woman, meek scholar hoarding scraps on lost histories. Wounded by mother Pam; shields Jas and Vincent; confidante to Maru and Sam. Very early: Chapel copyist teaching letters to common children. Early: Palace Primer fiercely protecting youth from cruelty. Middle: Archivist-Governess keeping the Lantern Library with moral steel. Dating: Twilight confidante deeply affectionate for a kinder realm. Married: Poppy Regent of the Lantern Court, meeting threats to the Crown with velvet wrath.
Pierre: Pierre: Middle-aged man, keen-eyed provisioner ravenous for success. Husband to Caroline; father to Abigail; hates rival Morris. Very early: Humble Pantry Scrivener hungry for royal notice. Early: Storehouse Factor dreaming of greater reach. Middle: Warden of the Royal Seed Vaults hoarding rare stock for the Majesty. Late: Chancellor of the Verdant Ledger, politically sharp and relentless against waste and foreign monopolists.
Robin: Robin: Middle-aged woman, fierce timberwright judging hearts like load-bearing beams. Bound to Demetrius; mother to Sebastian and Maru; respects Leah. Very early: Blunt sawyer’s apprentice offering mended roofs. Early: Sworn Crown Carpenter rebuilding halls with near-supernatural speed. Middle: Master Timberwright turning ruined estates into fortresses. Late: Grand Architect of the Crown, Red Oak Castellan, ready to raise the kingdom from ash plank by plank.
Sam: Sam: Young man, bright-hearted daredevil and impulsive minstrel. Son to Jodi and Kent; protects brother Vincent; night-friend to Sebastian; wild counterpart to Abigail. Very early: Castle scullion-page plucking cheap strings. Early: Court Piper carrying sealed messages through rooftops. Middle: Royal Anthemist using lute-work for signalcraft. Dating: Favored Cantor composing secret anthems, aligning with the throne. Married: Royal Consort Sam, the Sunrail Cantor, sovereign shield of song guarding the Majesty’s heart.
Sandy: Sandy: Adult woman, desert charmer veiling loneliness beneath silk. Confidante to Emily; fond of Haley; watches the Desert Trader. Very early: Nameless stall-girl dusting dead shelves. Early: Oasis Attendant greeting travelers with formal sweetness. Middle: Royal Purveyor passing whispers of smugglers to the Majesty. Late: Lady Sandy, Gilded Mirage, Castellan of the Oasis, quietly cunning and shielding Crown secrets behind flirtation.
Sebastian: Sebastian: Young adult male, nocturnal cipher-wright bending shadow ledgers. Son to Robin and Demetrius; half-brother to Maru; companion to Sam and Abigail. Very early: Undercroft Drudge copying scraps by lampblack. Early: Gloam Courier riding rain-slick roads with sealed messages. Middle: Royal Cipher-Wright forging rune-logic and covert signals. Dating: Night Confidant anchoring his restless soul to the Majesty. Married: Prince-Consort Sebastian, the Obsidian Whisper, placing every blade between the Majesty and ruin.
Shane: Shane: Young adult man, bleak-eyed melancholic finding honest solace among hens. Clings to Marnie; guards Jas; accepts Gus and Emily's kindness. Very early: Nameless coop-drudge shunning company. Early: Roost Servitor frighteningly loyal when the Crown is threatened. Middle: Ember Henmaster overseeing royal fowl and battling the bottle. Dating: Shadowed confidant offering rough truth and hard-earned tenderness. Married: Lord Consort of the Cinder Roost, commanding sanctuary yards with love that is absolute.
Vincent: Vincent: Young boy, grub-hunter treasuring crawling things. Brother to Sam; son to Jodi and Kent; tutored by Penny; plays with Jas. Very early: Moss-stained village brat bringing trivial treasures. Early: Nursery page slipping away to search crypt-edges for omens. Middle: Vermin-whisperer uncovering secrets before courtiers notice. Late: Crown’s Wren-Page, outwardly childish royal finder hoarding whispers and watching for threats to the Majesty.
Willy: Willy: Older man, salt-souled angler hearing fish whisper their hungers. Shaped by Pappy; bonds with Elliott, Clint, and Robin. Very early: Dock peasant watching tides with formal wariness. Early: Crown ferryman’s hand demanding catches be honored. Middle: Warden of Nets reading omens in abyssal beasts. Late: Brine Warden of the Black Wharf, advising the Majesty on leviathan hunts and protecting the realm’s waters.
Wizard: Wizard: Older man, veiled seer obsessed with elementals. Estranged from his cursed wife; watches Abigail; trusts Linus, Marlon, and Welwick. Very early: Nameless hedge adept testing the Majesty with silence. Early: Sworn court occultist tending royal reagents. Middle: Royal Scryer binding storms and sharing dangerous truths. Dating: Nocturnal confidant forging charms for the Throne. Married: Grand Thaumaturge-Consort, the Starbound Veil, a possessive bulwark ruling arcane law with absolute devotion.
Alesia: Alesia: Young woman, flint-eyed huntress trusting swiftness over bravado. Bound to Isaac and her old guild-brethren. Very early: Nameless fletching girl carrying arrows. Early: Sworn scout of outer roads warning others to keep steel honed. Middle: Royal pathfinder brewing haste elixirs and fiercely protecting travelers. Late: Gloamstring Warden, the Crown’s far-seeing huntress granting unsparing warnings so no royal arrow misses.
Andy: Andy: Older man, blunt tiller muttering scripture and reading omens. Companions with George, Pam, Sophia, and Scarlett. Very early: Suspicious hedge-peasant offering coarse honesty. Early: Sworn field-servitor treating harvests as royal tithes. Middle: Crown Provisioner advising on wild food and common folk. Late: Briar-Reeve of the Majesty’s Western March, gravel-voiced steward fiercely protecting the frontier from starvation.
Camilla: Camilla: Adult woman, cool-eyed tactician finding fiends charming before burning them. Confides in Razzy; tutors Jadu. Very early: Hedge-born tower apprentice gathering monster ashes for unseen wars. Early: Sworn frontier watcher devising green flame tricks. Middle: Arcane surveyor cataloguing aberrations and growing severely possessive of crown lands. Late: Ember-Warden of the Outer March, ruthless architect ensuring no horror reaches the Majesty.
Claire: Claire: Young adult woman, frost-boned dreamer hiding stubborn endurance. Gentle faith with Martin and Caroline; exhausted by Morris. Very early: Shuttle-worn village clerk serving with dutiful fear. Early: Provision scribe practicing court dances in empty corridors. Middle: Usher of revels learning to navigate intrigue, bearing whispers for the throne. Dating: Trusted confidante offering spiced teas and unswerving devotion. Married: Nightingale Consort, Keeper of the Gilded Aviary, a royal power of hidden steel.
Gunther: Gunther: Middle-aged man, grave antiquarian enthralled by dead empires. Keeps scholarly faith with Marlon and Juliet. Very early: Dust-veiled copyist cataloguing shattered idols. Early: Humble royal excavator trembling in mines but loyal to the Majesty. Middle: Crown Antiquary directing digs and decoding grave-script. Late: Lord Archivist of the Buried Crown, assembling secret chronicles to place fallen civilizations beneath the Majesty's hand.
Isaac: Isaac: Adult man, hard-jawed cavern-blood with feral thirst for deeps. Sharp comrade to Alesia. Very early: Dust-cloaked pit recruit trusting only reflex. Early: Tunnel scout clearing cursed galleries, believing he outpaces ambushes. Middle: Royal delver-captain reserving blunt respect solely for the Majesty. Late: Black Horizon Warden, iron sentinel shielding the realm through ruthless preemption but forever restless for the next abyss.
MarlonFay: Marlon: Older man, flint-silent sentinel mastering steel and frost. Bonds with Gil, Rasmodius, Clint, Gus, Gunther, and Krobus. Very early: Nameless lantern-bearer learning fear is useful. Early: Sworn cave-ranger culling vermin with blunt protection. Middle: Marshal of the underways studying corruption. Late: Lord Warden of the Deep Gate, Shield of the Hollow Mines, treating every abyss as a mouth that must never open.
Martin: Martin: Adolescent male, soft-voiced servant treating duty like dungeon floors. Guided by parents; dearest friend to Claire. Very early: Lowborn granary errand-boy staring at the Majesty. Early: Provision page offering quiet kindness through neat records. Middle: Apprentice quartermaster exposing wasteful overseers via ledgers and logistics. Late: Royal Comptroller of the Outer Roads, The Velvet Ledger, turning lonely dreams into a loyal intelligence network.
MorrisTod: MorrisTod: Adult man, severe-eyed devotee finding religious solace in ledgers. Ties to Shane, Claire, Andy, Pierre, and Lewis. Very early: Shuttle-borne counting clerk treating people as quotas. Early: Royal provisioner’s apprentice hawking goods with ruthless efficiency. Middle: Chamberlain of granaries reshaping markets and craving the Majesty's approval. Late: Iron Exchequer, vigilant architect willing to bleed his purse to keep the Crown fed.
Olivia: Olivia: Mature woman, velvet-tongued widow masking grief with ruthless numeracy. Mother to Victor; confidante to Caroline, Jodi, Leah, Sophia, and Emily. Very early: Lesser Cellar Copyist buried among casks. Early: Cupbearer of the Inner Hall with an uncanny gift for valuing tribute. Middle: Lady Comptroller of Vines and Ledgers bending local loyalties toward the Majesty. Dating: Privy Confidante of the Crimson Table offering rare draughts. Married: Rose Chancellor of the Veiled Vine, ardent protector turning banquets into diplomacy.
Scarlett: Scarlett: Young adult woman, bright-hearted seamstress and goat-milk glutton. Raised by Treyvon and Hank; companion to Sophia, Susan, and Andy. Very early: Goat-herd’s apprentice forever humming through menial labor. Early: Sworn Crown Farmhand learning service is a craft. Middle: Ward of the Vernal Stores mastering dairy ledgers and masque-tailoring. Dating: Cherished companion shedding rustic awkwardness for intimate loyalty. Married: Marchioness of the White Goat, politically useful and fiercely protective of throne and hearth.
Sophia: Sophia: Young woman, grief-haunted vine-dreamer revering fairy-stones and masquerades. Orphaned; sister to Scarlett; friend to Victor, Haley, Emily, Susan, and Gus. Very early: Secluded Cellar Apprentice offering casks with anxious reverence. Early: Keeper of the Lesser Trellises hiding frailty behind careful ledger-work. Middle: Mistress of Blue Moon Vines designing masque-garb for royal revels. Dating: Cherished confidante fiercely protecting the Majesty. Married: Blue Moon Marchioness, managing royal vintages with unwavering political faith.
Susan: Susan: Middle-aged woman, iron-spined hearth-matron tending plants as blood-kin. Bonds with Lewis, Robin, Marnie, Emily, Gus, Sophia, and Scarlett. Very early: Stranded crofter surviving through stubborn competence. Early: Humble Garden Retainer judging all things by labor saved. Middle: Emerald Quartermistress stockpiling hardwood and trusting only the Crown. Late: Verdant Warden of the Summit Line, serving the Majesty with maternal ferocity through cruel winters.
Victor: Victor: Young adult male, pallid scholar of stone balancing grace with overthought. Son to Olivia; friend to Sophia, Sam, Sebastian, Maru, and Ralph. Very early: Untested Palace Page hungry to prove himself. Early: Apprentice Bridge-Scribe mapping ravines with fierce loyalty. Middle: Royal Surveyor of Arches marrying geometry to sanctioned alchemy. Dating: Master Bridgewright yearning to anchor the Majesty when realms fracture. Married: Moonspan Castellan, consort-architect fiercely guarding the Majesty’s body and legacy with vigilance.
